zh.lifeSummary: 當Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay於1130年出生在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼時，他的父親Sir Renaud de Courtenay I30歲，母親Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeil-6歲。他和Hawise de Courcy至少有3個兒子。他於1172年登記服兵役。他去世於1194年9月27日在英國戴文奧可哈普頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特可姆。

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

nameMeanings.name: De

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay was born in 1130, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, his father, Sir Renaud de Courtenay I, was 30 and his mother, Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeil, was -6. He had at least 3 sons with Hawise de Courcy. He registered for military service in 1172. He died on 27 September 1194, in Okehampton, Devon, England, at the age of 64, and was buried in Thorncombe, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay est né en 1130, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France, son père, Sir Renaud de Courtenay I, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeil, avait -6 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Hawise de Courcy. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1172. Il est décédé le 27 septembre 1194, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Thorncombe, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenayが1130年にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトコウルテナイで生まれた時，父Sir Renaud de Courtenay Iは30歳，母Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeilは-6歳であった。彼はHawise de Courcyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1172年に兵役登録をした。彼は1194年9月27日にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトソルンコンベにて埋葬された。

ko.Courtenay, 45320, Loiret, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay(이)가 1130년 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Renaud de Courtenay I(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeil(은)는 -6세였다. 그는 Hawise de Courcy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1172년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1194년 9월 27일 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 토른코브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay nasceu em 1130, em Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, França, seu pai, Sir Renaud de Courtenay I, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeil, tinha -6 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Hawise de Courcy. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1172. Ele faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1194, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Thorncombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Courtenay, 45320, Loiret, France: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reinauld De Seigneur De Courtenay родился в 1130 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Renaud de Courtenay I было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Hélène ou Élisabeth du Donjon de Corbeil, -6. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Hawise de Courcy. В 1172 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 27 сентября 1194 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности таурнкомб, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Hawise de Courcy. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1172. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1194, en Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Thorncombe, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
